item.title: Hồ sơ điện tử của bạn
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
<!-- wp:html --> trở đi)
5. Xuất bản → Xem trang
==========================================================
-->

<!-- wp:html -->
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Be+Vietnam+Pro:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<style>

    :root {
      --blue: #004080;
      --blue-dark: #003366;
      --blue-light: #E8F1FA;
      --blue-mid: #1A6BB5;
      --red: #DC3545;
      --green: #28A745;
      --green-dark: #1E7E34;
      --green-bg: #E8F8EC;
      --gray: #6C757D;
      --gray-light: #F5F7FA;
      --border: #E5EAF0;
      --text: #1A2332;
      --text-muted: #5A6577;
      --white: #FFFFFF;
      --shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0, 64, 128, 0.08);
      --shadow-sm: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
      --radius: 12px;
      --radius-sm: 8px;
      --max: 1120px;
    }
    .eh-landing, .eh-landing * { box-sizing: border-box; }
    .eh-landing { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    .eh-landing {
      font-family: "Be Vietnam Pro", sans-serif !important;
      color: var(--text);
      background: var(--white);
      line-height: 1.5;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }
    img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }
    a { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; }
    button { font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; }
    .container { width: min(100% - 32px, var(--max)); margin-inline: auto; }

    /* ===== HEADER ===== */
    .site-header {
      background: var(--white);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      z-index: 100;
    }
    .header-inner {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 12px 0;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .logo {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .logo-mark {
      width: 42px;
      height: 42px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .logo-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; line-height: 1.15; }
    .logo-text strong {
      color: var(--blue);
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    }
    .logo-text span {
      color: var(--red);
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .header-phone {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      color: var(--blue);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1rem;
    }
    .header-phone svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; fill: var(--blue); }

    /* ===== HERO ===== */
    .hero {
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      background:
        linear-gradient(105deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.96) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.88) 48%, rgba(232,241,250,0.55) 100%),
        url("https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1488646953014-85cb44e25828?w=1400&q=80") center/cover no-repeat;
    }
    .hero-inner {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 0.9fr;
      gap: 24px;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 36px 0 28px;
      min-height: 280px;
    }
    .hero-copy h1 {
      color: var(--blue);
      font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 3.2vw, 2.15rem);
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
      line-height: 1.25;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .hero-copy .subtitle {
      color: var(--red);
      font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 2vw, 1.2rem);
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.01em;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .hero-copy .tagline {
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-size: 0.92rem;
      max-width: 420px;
    }
    .hero-visual {
      position: relative;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: flex-end;
    }
    .hero-photo {
      width: min(100%, 380px);
      border-radius: 16px;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0, 64, 128, 0.18);
      aspect-ratio: 4/3;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    /* ===== STEPPER ===== */
    .stepper-wrap {
      background: var(--white);
      padding: 8px 0 20px;
    }
    .stepper {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: space-between;
      position: relative;
      gap: 4px;
      padding: 16px 8px 8px;
      background: var(--gray-light);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .stepper::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      top: 36px;
      left: 10%;
      right: 10%;
      height: 3px;
      background: #D0D7E2;
      z-index: 0;
    }
    .step {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      text-align: center;
      gap: 8px;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .step-icon {
      width: 36px;
      height: 36px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      background: #D0D7E2;
      color: var(--white);
      border: 3px solid var(--white);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
    }
    .step.done .step-icon { background: var(--green); }
    .step.active .step-icon {
      background: var(--blue);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0, 64, 128, 0.18);
    }
    .step-label {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      line-height: 1.3;
      max-width: 110px;
    }
    .step.done .step-label { color: var(--green-dark); }
    .step.active .step-label { color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; }

    /* ===== USER CARD ===== */
    .user-card {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 16px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      background: var(--white);
      border: 1px solid #E6ECF2;
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 18px 22px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(15, 40, 80, 0.05);
      margin: 8px 0 16px;
    }
    .user-left {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .avatar {
      width: 56px;
      height: 56px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: #E8F1FA;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: #4A90C8;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .avatar svg { width: 30px; height: 30px; }
    .user-meta h2 {
      font-size: 1.08rem;
      font-weight: 400;
      color: #2C3E50;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .user-meta h2 strong {
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #1A2332;
    }
    .user-meta p {
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: #8A94A6;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }
    .user-status {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: flex-end;
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .user-status-label {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: #8A94A6;
      font-weight: 500;
    }
    .badge-updated {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      background: #E8F8EC;
      color: #1E7E34;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      padding: 8px 14px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      border: 1px solid #C6E9D1;
    }
    .badge-updated .check {
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: #28A745;
      color: #fff;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .badge-updated .check svg { width: 11px; height: 11px; }

    /* ===== STATS ===== */
    .stats-section { margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .stats-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .stat-card {
      background: var(--white);
      border: 1px solid #E6ECF2;
      border-radius: 14px;
      padding: 14px 12px 16px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(15, 40, 80, 0.04);
      transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .stat-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    }
    .stat-title {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #3D4A5C;
      line-height: 1.35;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      min-height: 2.1em;
    }
    .stat-mid {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .stat-icon {
      width: 44px;
      height: 44px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
    }
    .stat-icon svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }
    .stat-icon.blue { background: #E3F0FF; color: #2F80ED; }
    .stat-icon.teal { background: #E0F7F4; color: #14B8A6; }
    .stat-icon.orange { background: #FFF0E6; color: #F2994A; }
    .stat-icon.purple { background: #F0E8FF; color: #9B51E0; }
    .stat-icon.navy { background: #E8EEF8; color: #2D6A9F; }
    .stat-icon.pink { background: #FCE8EF; color: #EB5757; }
    .stat-value { min-width: 0; }
    .stat-num {
      font-size: 1.55rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      line-height: 1.05;
    }
    .stat-card.blue .stat-num { color: #2F80ED; }
    .stat-card.teal .stat-num { color: #14B8A6; }
    .stat-card.orange .stat-num { color: #F2994A; }
    .stat-card.purple .stat-num { color: #9B51E0; }
    .stat-card.navy .stat-num { color: #2D6A9F; }
    .stat-card.pink .stat-num { color: #EB5757; }
    .stat-unit {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      color: #8A94A6;
      font-weight: 500;
      margin-top: 2px;
      line-height: 1.3;
    }
    .stats-note {
      margin-top: 12px;
      background: #F0F7FF;
      border-radius: 10px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: #2D4A6F;
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 10px;
      line-height: 1.5;
    }
    .stats-note svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; color: #2F80ED; }

    /* ===== SECTION COMMON ===== */
    .section {
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      background: var(--white);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .section-head {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 16px 18px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: #FAFBFC;
    }
    .section-head h3 {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--blue);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }
    .section-head h3 svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: var(--red); }
    .toggle-btn {
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--blue-mid);
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      padding: 6px 10px;
      border-radius: 6px;
    }
    .toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--blue-light); }
    .section-body { padding: 18px; }

    /* ===== SCHOLARSHIP CAROUSEL ===== */
    .carousel-wrap {
      position: relative;
    }
    .carousel {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      overflow-x: auto;
      scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
      scrollbar-width: none;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
      padding: 4px 2px 12px;
    }
    .carousel::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
    .country-card {
      flex: 0 0 148px;
      scroll-snap-align: start;
      background: var(--white);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 14px 12px;
      text-align: center;
      transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .country-card:hover,
    .country-card.active {
      border-color: var(--blue);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0, 64, 128, 0.12);
    }
    .flag {
      width: 48px;
      height: 48px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      margin: 0 auto 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 2px solid var(--border);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      background: #F0F4F8;
    }
    .country-card h4 {
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text);
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .country-card p {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .btn-detail {
      display: inline-block;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--blue);
      border: 1px solid var(--blue);
      padding: 5px 12px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
    }
    .btn-detail:hover {
      background: var(--blue);
      color: var(--white);
    }
    .carousel-nav {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }
    .nav-arrow {
      width: 36px;
      height: 36px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      background: var(--white);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: var(--blue);
      transition: background 0.2s;
    }
    .nav-arrow:hover { background: var(--blue-light); }
    .view-all-wrap { text-align: center; margin-top: 14px; }
    .btn-view-all {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      background: var(--blue);
      color: var(--white);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 10px 20px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    }
    .btn-view-all:hover { background: var(--blue-dark); }

    /* ===== BENEFITS ===== */
    .benefits-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 16px 12px;
    }
    .benefit-item {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 8px 6px;
    }
    .benefit-icon {
      width: 52px;
      height: 52px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--green-bg);
      color: var(--green);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      margin: 0 auto 10px;
      border: 1.5px solid #B7E4C7;
    }
    .benefit-icon svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; }
    .benefit-item h4 {
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text);
      margin-bottom: 2px;
    }
    .benefit-item p {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      line-height: 1.35;
    }
    .btn-benefits {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 8px;
      width: 100%;
      margin-top: 18px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green), #34C759);
      color: var(--white);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 0.92rem;
      padding: 14px 20px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(40, 167, 69, 0.3);
    }
    .btn-benefits:hover { filter: brightness(1.05); }

    /* ===== ACCORDIONS ===== */
    .accordion-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
    .acc-item {
      background: var(--white);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
    }
    .acc-trigger {
      width: 100%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 16px 18px;
      text-align: left;
      font-size: 0.92rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--blue);
      transition: background 0.2s;
    }
    .acc-trigger:hover { background: var(--gray-light); }
    .acc-trigger .left {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .acc-trigger .left svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; color: var(--blue-mid); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .acc-trigger .chevron {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
      color: var(--gray);
      transition: transform 0.25s ease;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .acc-item.open .acc-trigger .chevron { transform: rotate(180deg); }
    .acc-panel {
      display: none;
      padding: 0 18px 16px;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      line-height: 1.6;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding-top: 14px;
    }
    .acc-item.open .acc-panel { display: block; }
    .acc-panel ul { padding-left: 18px; margin-top: 8px; }
    .acc-panel li { margin-bottom: 4px; }

    /* ===== CTA ===== */
    .cta-section {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F0F6FC 0%, #E8F8EC 100%);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 24px;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 160px 1fr auto;
      gap: 24px;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .cta-photo {
      width: 140px;
      height: 140px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      object-fit: cover;
      border: 4px solid var(--white);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    .cta-content h2 {
      font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2.2vw, 1.4rem);
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--blue);
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .cta-content p {
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .cta-buttons {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .btn-cta {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      color: var(--white);
      transition: transform 0.15s, filter 0.15s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .btn-cta:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); filter: brightness(1.05); }
    .btn-cta.red { background: var(--red); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.3); }
    .btn-cta.blue { background: var(--blue); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 64, 128, 0.3); }
    .btn-cta.green { background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(40, 167, 69, 0.3); }

    .countdown {
      text-align: center;
      min-width: 200px;
    }
    .countdown-label {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .countdown-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .count-box {
      background: var(--blue);
      color: var(--white);
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 10px 6px;
      min-width: 48px;
    }
    .count-box .num {
      font-size: 1.25rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      line-height: 1;
      display: block;
    }
    .count-box .unit {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      opacity: 0.85;
      margin-top: 4px;
      display: block;
    }
    .countdown-deadline {
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--red);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    /* ===== TRUST ===== */
    .trust {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 40px;
      padding: 20px;
      background: var(--gray-light);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
    }
    .trust-item {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 8px;
    }
    .trust-item .icon {
      width: 40px;
      height: 40px;
      margin: 0 auto 8px;
      color: var(--blue);
    }
    .trust-item .icon svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
    .trust-item strong {
      display: block;
      font-size: 1.15rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--blue);
    }
    .trust-item span {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
    }

    /* ===== FOOTER ===== */
    .site-footer {
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 20px 0;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
    }

    /* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
      .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
      .benefits-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
      .cta-section { grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr; }
      .countdown { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .hero-inner {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        padding: 24px 0 20px;
        text-align: center;
      }
      .hero-copy .tagline { margin-inline: auto; }
      .hero-visual { justify-content: center; order: -1; }
      .hero-photo { width: min(100%, 320px); }

      .stepper {
        overflow-x: auto;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        gap: 0;
        padding: 16px 12px 12px;
      }
      .stepper::before { left: 40px; right: 40px; width: calc(5 * 100px - 80px); }
      .step { flex: 0 0 100px; }
      .step-label { font-size: 0.65rem; max-width: 90px; }

      .user-card { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
      .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .benefits-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .benefit-item:last-child { grid-column: 1 / -1; max-width: 50%; margin-inline: auto; }

      .cta-section {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        text-align: center;
        padding: 20px 16px;
      }
      .cta-buttons { justify-content: center; }
      .btn-cta { flex: 1 1 100%; }
      .countdown { min-width: 0; }
      .trust { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    }

    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .logo-text span { display: none; }
      .header-phone { font-size: 0.9rem; }
      .stat-num { font-size: 1.4rem; }
      .country-card { flex: 0 0 136px; }
      .section-head h3 { font-size: 0.82rem; }
    }

    /* Collapse animation helper */
    .is-collapsed { display: none !important; }
  

/* WordPress theme conflict resets */
.eh-landing, .eh-landing * { box-sizing: border-box; }
.eh-landing { font-family: "Be Vietnam Pro", sans-serif !important; max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; }
.entry-content .eh-landing p { margin: 0; }
.entry-content .eh-landing ul { margin: 0; }
.eh-landing .container { width: min(100% - 32px, 1120px); margin-inline: auto; }
</style>
<div class="eh-landing">
<!-- HEADER -->
  <header class="site-header">
    <div class="container header-inner">
      <a class="logo" href="#">
        <svg class="logo-mark" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true">
          <rect width="48" height="48" rx="10" fill="#004080"/>
          <path d="M14 14h20v5H20v3.5h12v5H20V34H14V14z" fill="#fff"/>
          <path d="M10 36c8-2 16 2 28-6" stroke="#DC3545" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
        </svg>
        <div class="logo-text">
          <strong>EHoldings</strong>
          <span>Education First</span>
        </div>
      </a>
      <a class="header-phone" href="tel:1900988933">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6.6 10.8c1.4 2.8 3.8 5.1 6.6 6.6l2.2-2.2c.3-.3.7-.4 1.1-.2 1.2.4 2.5.6 3.8.6.6 0 1 .4 1 1V20c0 .6-.4 1-1 1C10.6 21 3 13.4 3 4c0-.6.4-1 1-1h3.5c.6 0 1 .4 1 1 0 1.3.2 2.6.6 3.8.1.4 0 .8-.3 1.1L6.6 10.8z"/></svg>
        1900 988 933
      </a>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="container hero-inner">
      <div class="hero-copy">
        <h1>HỒ SƠ ĐIỆN TỬ CỦA BẠN</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">PHƯƠNG ÁN DU HỌC & LÀM VIỆC QUỐC TẾ 2026</p>
        <p class="tagline">Lựa chọn phù hợp – Tương lai vững chắc cùng EHoldings Education First</p>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-visual">
        <img
          class="hero-photo"
          src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523240795612-9a054b0db644?w=800&q=80"
          alt="Du học sinh quốc tế với hộ chiếu"
          width="380"
          height="285"
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <main class="container">
    <!-- STEPPER -->
    <div class="stepper-wrap">
      <div class="stepper" role="list" aria-label="Tiến độ hồ sơ">
        <div class="step done" role="listitem">
          <div class="step-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3"><path d="M5 12l5 5L20 7"/></svg>
          </div>
          <span class="step-label">Hồ sơ được tiếp nhận</span>
        </div>
        <div class="step done" role="listitem">
          <div class="step-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3"><path d="M5 12l5 5L20 7"/></svg>
          </div>
          <span class="step-label">Đã đánh giá sơ bộ</span>
        </div>
        <div class="step done" role="listitem">
          <div class="step-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3"><path d="M5 12l5 5L20 7"/></svg>
          </div>
          <span class="step-label">Đề xuất lộ trình phù hợp</span>
        </div>
        <div class="step active" role="listitem">
          <div class="step-icon">4</div>
          <span class="step-label">Xác nhận quan tâm</span>
        </div>
        <div class="step" role="listitem">
          <div class="step-icon">5</div>
          <span class="step-label">Tư vấn 1:1</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- USER CARD -->
    <div class="user-card">
      <div class="user-left">
        <div class="avatar" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 12c2.7 0 4.8-2.1 4.8-4.8S14.7 2.4 12 2.4 7.2 4.5 7.2 7.2 9.3 12 12 12zm0 2.4c-3.2 0-9.6 1.6-9.6 4.8V22h19.2v-2.8c0-3.2-6.4-4.8-9.6-4.8z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="user-meta">
          <h2>
            Xin chào, <strong>Nguyễn Văn A</strong>
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#E8A838" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 2l2.4 7.2H22l-6 4.4 2.3 7.2L12 16.8 5.7 20.8 8 13.6 2 9.2h7.6L12 2z"/></svg>
          </h2>
          <p>Mã hồ sơ: EH260001 | Ngày cập nhật: 21/07/2026</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="user-status">
        <span class="user-status-label">Trạng thái hồ sơ</span>
        <span class="badge-updated">
          ĐÃ CẬP NHẬT
          <span class="check" aria-hidden="true">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"><path d="M5 12l5 5L20 7"/></svg>
          </span>
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STATS -->
    <section class="stats-section" aria-label="Thống kê gợi ý">
      <div class="stats-grid">
        <article class="stat-card blue">
          <div class="stat-title">Quốc gia phù hợp</div>
          <div class="stat-mid">
            <div class="stat-icon blue">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M3 12h18M12 3a15 15 0 010 18M12 3a15 15 0 000 18"/></svg>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-value">
              <div class="stat-num">08</div>
              <div class="stat-unit">lựa chọn</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
        <article class="stat-card teal">
          <div class="stat-title">Chương trình phù hợp</div>
          <div class="stat-mid">
            <div class="stat-icon teal">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 10v6M2 10l10-5 10 5-10 5z"/><path d="M6 12v5c3 2 9 2 12 0v-5"/></svg>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-value">
              <div class="stat-num">32</div>
              <div class="stat-unit">chương trình</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
        <article class="stat-card orange">
          <div class="stat-title">Chính sách hỗ trợ & học bổng</div>
          <div class="stat-mid">
            <div class="stat-icon orange">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M20 12v8H4v-8M2 7h20v5H2zM12 22V7M12 7H7.5a2.5 2.5 0 010-5C11 2 12 7 12 7zM12 7h4.5a2.5 2.5 0 000-5C13 2 12 7 12 7z"/></svg>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-value">
              <div class="stat-num">18</div>
              <div class="stat-unit">chính sách</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
        <article class="stat-card purple">
          <div class="stat-title">Trường đối tác</div>
          <div class="stat-mid">
            <div class="stat-icon purple">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 21h18M5 21V8l7-4 7 4v13M9 21v-6h6v6"/></svg>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-value">
              <div class="stat-num">120+</div>
              <div class="stat-unit">trường</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
        <article class="stat-card navy">
          <div class="stat-title">Lộ trình nghề nghiệp</div>
          <div class="stat-mid">
            <div class="stat-icon navy">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M16 7V5a2 2 0 00-2-2h-4a2 2 0 00-2 2v2"/></svg>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-value">
              <div class="stat-num">06</div>
              <div class="stat-unit">lộ trình</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
        <article class="stat-card pink">
          <div class="stat-title">Đã có thể nhận tư vấn</div>
          <div class="stat-mid">
            <div class="stat-icon pink">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 18v-6a9 9 0 0118 0v6"/><path d="M21 19a2 2 0 01-2 2h-1a2 2 0 01-2-2v-3a2 2 0 012-2h3zM3 19a2 2 0 002 2h1a2 2 0 002-2v-3a2 2 0 00-2-2H3z"/></svg>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-value">
              <div class="stat-num">06</div>
              <div class="stat-unit">chuyên gia</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
      </div>
      <div class="stats-note">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 2l7 3v6c0 5-3.5 8.5-7 10-3.5-1.5-7-5-7-10V5l7-3zm-1.1 13.3l5.6-5.6-1.4-1.4-4.2 4.2-2-2-1.4 1.4 3.4 3.4z"/></svg>
        <span>Thông tin trên được hệ thống đề xuất dựa trên hồ sơ hiện tại của bạn. Vui lòng xác nhận để được tư vấn chi tiết và giữ quyền ưu tiên.</span>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- SCHOLARSHIPS -->
    <section class="section" id="scholarships">
      <div class="section-head">
        <h3>
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M20 12v8H4v-8M2 7h20v5H2zM12 22V7M12 7H7.5a2.5 2.5 0 010-5C11 2 12 7 12 7zM12 7h4.5a2.5 2.5 0 000-5C13 2 12 7 12 7z"/></svg>
          Học bổng & chính sách hỗ trợ
        </h3>
        <button type="button" class="toggle-btn" data-toggle="scholarship-body" aria-expanded="true">
          Thu gọn
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="section-body" id="scholarship-body">
        <div class="carousel-wrap">
          <div class="carousel" id="country-carousel">
            <article class="country-card active">
              <div class="flag" aria-hidden="true">🇰🇷</div>
              <h4>Hàn Quốc</h4>
              <p>05 chính sách</p>
              <a class="btn-detail" href="#">Xem chi tiết</a>
            </article>
            <article class="country-card">
              <div class="flag" aria-hidden="true">🇩🇪</div>
              <h4>Đức</h4>
              <p>04 chính sách</p>
              <a class="btn-detail" href="#">Xem chi tiết</a>
            </article>
            <article class="country-card">
              <div class="flag" aria-hidden="true">🇯🇵</div>
              <h4>Nhật Bản</h4>
              <p>06 chính sách</p>
              <a class="btn-detail" href="#">Xem chi tiết</a>
            </article>
            <article class="country-card">
              <div class="flag" aria-hidden="true">🇹🇼</div>
              <h4>Đài Loan</h4>
              <p>03 chính sách</p>
              <a class="btn-detail" href="#">Xem chi tiết</a>
            </article>
            <article class="country-card">
              <div class="flag" aria-hidden="true">🇦🇺</div>
              <h4>Úc</h4>
              <p>04 chính sách</p>
              <a class="btn-detail" href="#">Xem chi tiết</a>
            </article>
            <article class="country-card">
              <div class="flag" aria-hidden="true">🇨🇦</div>
              <h4>Canada</h4>
              <p>05 chính sách</p>
              <a class="btn-detail" href="#">Xem chi tiết</a>
            </article>
            <article class="country-card">
              <div class="flag" aria-hidden="true">🇬🇧</div>
              <h4>Anh</h4>
              <p>03 chính sách</p>
              <a class="btn-detail" href="#">Xem chi tiết</a>
            </article>
            <article class="country-card">
              <div class="flag" aria-hidden="true">🇺🇸</div>
              <h4>Mỹ</h4>
              <p>04 chính sách</p>
              <a class="btn-detail" href="#">Xem chi tiết</a>
            </article>
          </div>
          <div class="carousel-nav">
            <button type="button" class="nav-arrow" id="carousel-prev" aria-label="Trước">
              <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M15 18l-6-6 6-6"/></svg>
            </button>
            <button type="button" class="nav-arrow" id="carousel-next" aria-label="Sau">
              <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M9 18l6-6-6-6"/></svg>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="view-all-wrap">
          <button type="button" class="btn-view-all">
            Xem tất cả quốc gia
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- BENEFITS -->
    <section class="section" id="benefits">
      <div class="section-head">
        <h3>
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M20 12v8H4v-8M2 7h20v5H2zM12 22V7"/></svg>
          Quyền lợi hồ sơ dành riêng cho bạn
        </h3>
      </div>
      <div class="section-body">
        <div class="benefits-grid">
          <div class="benefit-item">
            <div class="benefit-icon">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 00-4-4H5a4 4 0 00-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 00-3-3.87M16 3.13a4 4 0 010 7.75"/></svg>
            </div>
            <h4>Tư vấn 1:1</h4>
            <p>Chuyên gia đồng hành</p>
          </div>
          <div class="benefit-item">
            <div class="benefit-icon">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v16a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2V8z"/><path d="M14 2v6h6M16 13H8M16 17H8M10 9H8"/></svg>
            </div>
            <h4>Hỗ trợ hồ sơ</h4>
            <p>Chuẩn bị đầy đủ giấy tờ</p>
          </div>
          <div class="benefit-item">
            <div class="benefit-icon">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 10h18M8 4v4M16 4v4"/></svg>
            </div>
            <h4>Xin visa</h4>
            <p>Tỷ lệ đậu cao</p>
          </div>
          <div class="benefit-item">
            <div class="benefit-icon">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5z"/><path d="M2 17l10 5 10-5M2 12l10 5 10-5"/></svg>
            </div>
            <h4>Đón sân bay</h4>
            <p>Hỗ trợ khi đến nơi</p>
          </div>
          <div class="benefit-item">
            <div class="benefit-icon">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 21h18M5 21V8l7-4 7 4v13M9 21v-6h6v6"/></svg>
            </div>
            <h4>Ký túc xá</h4>
            <p>Tìm chỗ ở phù hợp</p>
          </div>
          <div class="benefit-item">
            <div class="benefit-icon">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M16 7V5a2 2 0 00-2-2h-4a2 2 0 00-2 2v2"/></svg>
            </div>
            <h4>Việc làm</h4>
            <p>Kết nối cơ hội nghề</p>
          </div>
          <div class="benefit-item">
            <div class="benefit-icon">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 11-5.93-9.14"/><path d="M22 4L12 14.01l-3-3"/></svg>
            </div>
            <h4>Sau nhập học</h4>
            <p>Đồng hành dài hạn</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="btn-benefits">
          Xem đầy đủ quyền lợi
          <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12h14M13 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- ACCORDIONS -->
    <div class="accordion-list">
      <div class="acc-item">
        <button type="button" class="acc-trigger" aria-expanded="false">
          <span class="left">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 21h18M5 21V8l7-4 7 4v13M9 21v-6h6v6"/></svg>
            Trường đối tác nổi bật (120+ trường)
          </span>
          <svg class="chevron" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <div class="acc-panel">
          <p>Danh sách trường đối tác phù hợp với hồ sơ của bạn:</p>
          <ul>
            <li>Đại học Quốc gia Seoul (Hàn Quốc)</li>
            <li>Technical University of Munich (Đức)</li>
            <li>Waseda University (Nhật Bản)</li>
            <li>University of Melbourne (Úc)</li>
            <li>University of Toronto (Canada)</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="acc-item">
        <button type="button" class="acc-trigger" aria-expanded="false">
          <span class="left">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 19.5A2.5 2.5 0 016.5 17H20"/><path d="M6.5 2H20v20H6.5A2.5 2.5 0 014 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 016.5 2z"/></svg>
            Lộ trình học tập & làm việc gợi ý
          </span>
          <svg class="chevron" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <div class="acc-panel">
          <p>Dựa trên hồ sơ, hệ thống đề xuất các lộ trình:</p>
          <ul>
            <li>Du học hệ cử nhân → thực tập → định cư</li>
            <li>Học nghề ngắn hạn → việc làm quốc tế</li>
            <li>Thạc sĩ chuyên ngành → nghiên cứu / doanh nghiệp</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="acc-item">
        <button type="button" class="acc-trigger" aria-expanded="false">
          <span class="left">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 00-4-4H5a4 4 0 00-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 00-3-3.87M16 3.13a4 4 0 010 7.75"/></svg>
            Hành trình thành công của học viên (10,000+)
          </span>
          <svg class="chevron" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <div class="acc-panel">
          <p>Hàng nghìn học viên đã hoàn thành lộ trình du học & làm việc quốc tế cùng EHoldings. Đặt lịch tư vấn để nghe câu chuyện thực tế phù hợp với hoàn cảnh của bạn.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CTA -->
    <section class="cta-section" aria-label="Sẵn sàng lựa chọn">
      <img
        class="cta-photo"
        src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1573497019940-1c28c88b4f3e?w=400&q=80"
        alt="Chuyên viên tư vấn EHoldings"
        width="140"
        height="140"
      />
      <div class="cta-content">
        <h2>SẴN SÀNG CHO LỰA CHỌN CỦA BẠN?</h2>
        <p>Giữ suất tư vấn ngay hôm nay để nhận lộ trình cá nhân hóa và ưu đãi hồ sơ 2026.</p>
        <div class="cta-buttons">
          <a class="btn-cta red" href="#giu-suat">GIỮ SUẤT TƯ VẤN</a>
          <a class="btn-cta blue" href="#kiem-tra">KIỂM TRA HỒ SƠ</a>
          <a class="btn-cta green" href="#tai-lieu">NHẬN TÀI LIỆU</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="countdown">
        <div class="countdown-label">Thời hạn xác nhận quan tâm</div>
        <div class="countdown-grid" id="countdown" aria-live="polite">
          <div class="count-box"><span class="num" id="cd-days">00</span><span class="unit">Ngày</span></div>
          <div class="count-box"><span class="num" id="cd-hours">00</span><span class="unit">Giờ</span></div>
          <div class="count-box"><span class="num" id="cd-mins">00</span><span class="unit">Phút</span></div>
          <div class="count-box"><span class="num" id="cd-secs">00</span><span class="unit">Giây</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="countdown-deadline">Hạn: 15/08/2026</div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- TRUST -->
    <div class="trust" aria-label="Thống kê tin cậy">
      <div class="trust-item">
        <div class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 00-4-4H5a4 4 0 00-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 00-3-3.87M16 3.13a4 4 0 010 7.75"/></svg>
        </div>
        <strong>10,000+</strong>
        <span>Học viên</span>
      </div>
      <div class="trust-item">
        <div class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 21h18M5 21V8l7-4 7 4v13"/></svg>
        </div>
        <strong>100+</strong>
        <span>Đối tác</span>
      </div>
      <div class="trust-item">
        <div class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 11-5.93-9.14"/><path d="M22 4L12 14.01l-3-3"/></svg>
        </div>
        <strong>98%</strong>
        <span>Tỷ lệ visa</span>
      </div>
      <div class="trust-item">
        <div class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#C9A227" stroke="#C9A227" stroke-width="1"><path d="M12 2l2.4 7.2H22l-6 4.4 2.3 7.2L12 16.8 5.7 20.8 8 13.6 2 9.2h7.6L12 2z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <strong>4.9/5</strong>
        <span>Đánh giá học viên</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </main>

  <footer class="site-footer">
    <div class="container">© 2026 EHoldings Education First · Hotline 1900 988 933</div>
  </footer>
</div>
<script>

    (function () {
      // Countdown to 15/08/2026 23:59:59
      var deadline = new Date("2026-08-15T23:59:59").getTime();
      function pad(n) { return n < 10 ? "0" + n : String(n); }
      function tick() {
        var now = Date.now();
        var diff = Math.max(0, deadline - now);
        var d = Math.floor(diff / 86400000);
        var h = Math.floor((diff % 86400000) / 3600000);
        var m = Math.floor((diff % 3600000) / 60000);
        var s = Math.floor((diff % 60000) / 1000);
        var elD = document.getElementById("cd-days");
        var elH = document.getElementById("cd-hours");
        var elM = document.getElementById("cd-mins");
        var elS = document.getElementById("cd-secs");
        if (elD) elD.textContent = pad(d);
        if (elH) elH.textContent = pad(h);
        if (elM) elM.textContent = pad(m);
        if (elS) elS.textContent = pad(s);
      }
      tick();
      setInterval(tick, 1000);

      // Carousel
      var carousel = document.getElementById("country-carousel");
      var prev = document.getElementById("carousel-prev");
      var next = document.getElementById("carousel-next");
      if (carousel && prev && next) {
        prev.addEventListener("click", function () {
          carousel.scrollBy({ left: -160, behavior: "smooth" });
        });
        next.addEventListener("click", function () {
          carousel.scrollBy({ left: 160, behavior: "smooth" });
        });
        carousel.querySelectorAll(".country-card").forEach(function (card) {
          card.addEventListener("click", function () {
            carousel.querySelectorAll(".country-card").forEach(function (c) { c.classList.remove("active"); });
            card.classList.add("active");
          });
        });
      }

      // Section toggle
      document.querySelectorAll("[data-toggle]").forEach(function (btn) {
        btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
          var id = btn.getAttribute("data-toggle");
          var panel = document.getElementById(id);
          if (!panel) return;
          var open = !panel.classList.contains("is-collapsed");
          panel.classList.toggle("is-collapsed", open);
          btn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", open ? "false" : "true");
          btn.childNodes[0].textContent = open ? "Mở rộng " : "Thu gọn ";
        });
      });

      // Accordions
      document.querySelectorAll(".acc-trigger").forEach(function (btn) {
        btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
          var item = btn.closest(".acc-item");
          var isOpen = item.classList.contains("open");
          document.querySelectorAll(".acc-item").forEach(function (i) {
            i.classList.remove("open");
            i.querySelector(".acc-trigger").setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
          });
          if (!isOpen) {
            item.classList.add("open");
            btn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
          }
        });
      });
    })();
  
</script>
<!-- /wp:html -->
